text:
On Thu, Apr 30, 2009 at 6:51 AM, Pav Lucistnik <pav@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Dear maintainer of FreeBSD port audio/amarok-kde4, please take a look at
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133718
>
> Do you approve/reject this patch?
>
Patch is approved.  I have had a report from one other user that this
patch fixed the last.fm issue.

Matt
